projectDescTasab: TASAB is an education-focused platform for structured courses and digital learning content — clear information architecture, responsive layouts, and a dependable experience for students and trainers operating in Egypt.
projectDescKontainar: KONTAINAR is a full Arabic e-commerce storefront with catalog discovery, a polished checkout journey, and brand-led UI tailored to retail expectations in the Saudi market.
projectDescAloshesha: Aloshesha is a Saudi retail experience for the vaping category: refined product presentation, trustworthy navigation, and a conversion-oriented flow aligned with the official storefront at aloshesha.com.
projectDescJoya: Joya Real Estate is a luxury property marketing site for Hurghada and El Gouna — aspirational visuals, disciplined typography, and Red Sea lifestyle storytelling aimed at Egyptian and international buyers.
projectDescLuqman: LUQMAN is a Jordan-based product experience: crisp UI, responsive flows, and a focused layout built for regional users — engineered for clarity from Amman outward.
projectDescZistiloPortfolio: Zistilo Portfolio is an interactive showcase of frontend craft: fluid motion, responsive systems, and brand-forward interface design that demonstrates depth in React-based product storytelling.
projectDescForex: Zistilo Forex App is a trading-oriented workspace with live currency context, data-rich charting, and a focused layout for users who follow forex markets in real time — built for clarity under information density.
